title: Only allocate tty when -t
body:
In our ezrly development, we always allocated a tty when not -d.  Now we should only allocated when the user asks for it.

Resolves: #573

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I want to test this manually, so hold off testing for now - I know there was a reason we added this in the first place, though I struggle to remember what it was.
Hopefully the test suite will figure this out.
@baude Can you rebase to pick up a fix for the test flakes?

I think part of the reason we originally mandated TTY for attach was https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/master/libpod/container_attach.go#L93-L95

I think this came out of the original CRI-O code, but I can no longer locate where it might be from. CRI-O itself seems to support non-terminal attach via https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/commit/7bb957bf757950e4c626e90b987fc09c98b1cefb#diff-8dcc5752401caf0388828766ed5235fc

Looking at this now, I think we should go ahead and do this.

@baude Can you remove https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/master/libpod/container_attach.go#L87-L96 at the same time? I don't think we'll ever want to reenable that bit.
The 'podman logs --since' tests seem racy. Might need some attention.
LGTM, we can merge once @rhatdan gives his OK

:pushpin: Commit 939cc7e has been approved by `rhatdan`
